title: Vegetarian Stir Fry with Creamy Sauce
description: A quick and easy stir fry made with a tangy creamy sauce, served with a variety of colorful vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until softened.
Add the stir-fry mix and cook for 3-4 minutes, until tender-crisp.
In a small bowl, whisk together the gluten-free soy sauce and creamy sauce.
Pour the sauce over the vegetables and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until coated.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve hot.
Serve over rice or noodles for a filling meal.
